heading: Officers in transition to and from the active-status list or active-duty list
label: 14317 Officers in transition to and from the active-status list or active-duty list
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in subsec. (a) of this section were contained in sections 3378, 5906, and 8378 of this title, prior to repeal by , (b)(2), (c)(1).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(1)

(A) designation before “is ordered”, substituted “duty; or” for “duty.”, and added subpar. (B).Pub. L. 110–417, § 513(a)Subsec. (e)(1)(B). , inserted “, or by examination for Federal recognition under title 32” before period at end.Pub. L. 110–417, § 513(b)2003—Subsec. (d). , substituted “Except as provided in subsection (e), if a reserve officer” for “If a reserve officer”.Pub. L. 108–136, § 512(a)(1)Subsec. (e). , amended heading and text of subsec. (e) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the military department concerned, a reserve officer who is not on the active-duty list and who is ordered to active duty in time of war or national emergency may, if eligible, be considered for promotion by a mandatory promotion board convened under section 14101(a) or a special selection board convened under for not more than two years from the date the officer is ordered to active duty unless the President suspends the operation of this section under the provisions of section 123 or 10213 of this title.”Pub. children.heading: .—Effect of Transfer to Inactive Status or Retired Status
children.label: a .—Effect of Transfer to Inactive Status or Retired Status

children.text: shall be treated as if the officer had not been considered and recommended for promotion by the selection board or examined and been found qualified for Federal recognition; and
may not be placed on a promotion list or promoted to the higher grade after returning to an active status,

children.heading: .—Effect of Placement on Active-Duty List
children.label: b .—Effect of Placement on Active-Duty List
children.text: A reserve officer who is on a promotion list as a result of selection for promotion by a mandatory promotion board convened under section 14101(a) or a special selection board convened under and who before being promoted is placed on the active-duty list of the same armed force and placed in the same competitive category shall, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, be placed on an appropriate promotion list for officers on the active-duty list established under chapter 36 of this title.section 14502 of this title

children.heading: .—Officers on a Promotion List Removed From Active-Duty List
children.label: c .—Officers on a Promotion List Removed From Active-Duty List
children.text: An officer who is on the active-duty list and is on a promotion list as the result of selection for promotion by a selection board convened under chapter 36 of this title and who before being promoted is removed from the active-duty list and placed on the reserve active-status list of the same armed force and in the same competitive category (including a regular officer who on removal from the active-duty list is appointed as a reserve officer and placed on the reserve active-status list) shall, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense, be placed on an appropriate promotion list established under this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: is ordered to active duty as a member of the unit in which the vacancy exists when that unit is ordered to active duty; or

children.label: B
children.text: has been ordered to or is serving on active duty in support of a contingency operation.

If, under this subsection, the name of an officer is removed from a list of officers recommended for promotion, the officer shall be treated as if the officer had not been considered for promotion or examined for Federal recognition.

children.heading: .—Officers Ordered to Active Duty in Time of War or National Emergency
children.label: e .—Officers Ordered to Active Duty in Time of War or National Emergency
A
children.text: by a mandatory promotion board convened under or a special selection board convened under ; orsection 14101(a) of this titlesection 14502 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an officer who has been ordered to or is serving on active duty in support of a contingency operation, by a vacancy promotion board convened under , or by examination for Federal recognition under title 32.section 14101(a) of this title
An officer may not be considered for promotion under this subsection after the end of the two-year period beginning on the date on which the officer is ordered to active duty.
An officer may not be considered for promotion under this subsection during a period when the operation of this section has been suspended by the President under .section 123(a) of this title
Consideration of an officer for promotion under this subsection shall be under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the military department concerned.
